key_features_for_minecraft.exterior_cladding: Grey natural stone on the arch exterior, with apartment windows in a grid pattern
key_features_for_minecraft.glass_end_walls: Cable-net glass facades on both open ends, 42m wide x 35m tall, largest in Europe
key_features_for_minecraft.interior_mural: Horn of Plenty by Arno Coenen & Iris Roskam, 11000 sqm of colorful fruits/flowers/insects on perforated aluminum panels
key_features_for_minecraft.apartments: 228 apartments built into the arch structure itself
key_features_for_minecraft.market_floor: 96 fresh food stalls at ground level under the arch

best_sources_summary.note: WebFetch was blocked for most sites during compilation. Many image_url fields point to page URLs rather than direct image files. Visit these pages to download the actual images.

top_sources_to_visit.has: 35-image gallery including exterior photos, interior photos, floor plans, sections, elevations. Photos by Ossip van Duivenbode, Daria Scagliola+Stijn Brakkee, Nico Saieh
Extensive photo gallery with numbered images (01-28+), structural diagrams, plans and sections
Detailed photos of the interior ceiling mural by Arno Coenen
Technical details and photos of the cable-net glass facade construction

minecraft_build_notes.scale_suggestion: At 1:1 the arch is 40x120x70 blocks - very buildable. Consider 1:2 scale (20x60x35) for a smaller build.
minecraft_build_notes.arch_profile: Horseshoe/parabolic arch - can be approximated with a semicircular or slightly pointed arch in Minecraft
minecraft_build_notes.exterior_blocks: Light grey stone bricks or smooth stone for the natural stone cladding. Glass panes in a grid for apartment windows.
minecraft_build_notes.glass_end_walls: Use glass panes or glass blocks for the cable-net facades. The cable grid is roughly 26x22 divisions.
minecraft_build_notes.interior_mural: Use colored concrete, terracotta, or glazed terracotta for the Horn of Plenty ceiling art. Key colors: bright greens, oranges, reds, yellows on a lighter background.
minecraft_build_notes.ground_floor: Open market hall with stalls - use slabs, stairs, and fence posts for market stall structures
